title: Inbound Private Link for performance-intensive services is now generally available ​
body:
**June 8, 2026**

Inbound Private Link for performance-intensive services, such as Lakebase Autoscaling and Zerobus Ingest, is now generally available. See [Configure inbound PrivateLink for performance-intensive services](/aws/en/security/network/front-end/service-direct-privatelink).

ref_links.text: Configure inbound PrivateLink for performance-intensive services
